flagged_moments.label: Sleep debt
flagged_moments.detail: 9.3h rolling deficit. Cannot recover today — manage around it.

flagged_moments.label: Dehydration + altitude
flagged_moments.detail: Denver at 5,280ft. SpO₂ 94%. 60%+ headache risk without intervention.

flagged_moments.label: Blood sugar dip
flagged_moments.detail: Only 1,040 kcal in 18h. Cognitive fog layering on sleep debt.

flagged_moments.label: Pre-broadcast cortisol spike
flagged_moments.detail: Adrenaline masking fatigue. Energy reads 55 but HRV says tank is empty.

flagged_moments.label: Adrenaline crash
flagged_moments.detail: Post-broadcast drop to 28. Danger zone. Caffeine here would wreck the red-eye.

flagged_moments.label: False second-wind trap
flagged_moments.detail: Energy reads 33 but caffeine still metabolically active. More coffee = 2h sleep on red-eye.

top_interventions.label: 75-min nap at hotel check-in
top_interventions.detail: One full sleep cycle. +12 energy points projected.

top_interventions.label: 40oz water by noon + electrolytes at 11am and 2pm
Timed fuel: 400 kcal by 11am, 200 kcal snack at 2:15pm, no caffeine after 2pm
top_interventions.detail: Holds energy above crash line through broadcast.

pulse_activity_log.message: Slept 4h 12m. Crash risk at 2:30pm. Prehydrating now.
pulse_activity_log.action: Electrolyte packets added to Instacart, delivery to The Maven Hotel by 9am.

pulse_activity_log.message: Pulse brief: Today's game plan — on-air at 3, red-eye tonight.
HRV's still low, you're running on adrenaline not fuel. Want me to tell Jess to set out bananas and almonds in greenroom B?
pulse_activity_log.action: SMS to Jess fired. Google Calendar blocked 3:30–3:50pm: Protein + hydration window.

pulse_activity_log.message: Filed. Nice work. Ordered salmon bowl from Modmarket — 14 minutes, meeting you at The Maven.
pulse_activity_log.action: DoorDash confirmation email sent to Maya's inbox.

pulse_activity_log.message: Skip the second coffee. Sleep mode on when you land. Tomorrow's forecast is set.
pulse_activity_log.action: Apple Watch sleep mode enabled. Alarm set for 7:30am.
